chapters.zh: 他必不顾他列祖的神，也不顾妇女所羡慕的神，无论何神他都不顾；因为他必自大，高过一切。
chapters.en: Neither shall he regard the God of his fathers, nor the desire of women, nor regard any god: for he shall magnify himself above all.

chapters.zh: 他倒要敬拜保障的神，用金、银、宝石和可爱之物敬奉他列祖所不认识的神。
chapters.en: But in his estate shall he honour the God of forces: and a god whom his fathers knew not shall he honour with gold, and silver, and with precious stones, and pleasant things.

chapters.zh: 他必靠外邦神的帮助，攻破最坚固的保障。凡承认他的，他必将荣耀加给他们，使他们管辖许多人，又为贿赂分地与他们。
chapters.en: Thus shall he do in the most strong holds with a strange god, whom he shall acknowledge increase with glory: and he shall cause them to rule over many, and shall divide the land for gain.

chapters.zh: 到末了，南方王要与他交战。北方王必用战车、马兵，和许多战船，势如暴风来攻击他，也必进入列国，如洪水泛滥。
chapters.en: And at the time of the end shall the king of the south push at him: and the king of the north shall come against him like a whirlwind, with chariots, and with horsemen, and with many ships; and he shall enter into the countries, and shall overflow and pass over.

chapters.zh: 又必进入那荣美之地，有许多国就被倾覆，但以东人、摩押人，和一大半亚扪人必脱离他的手。
chapters.en: He shall enter also into the glorious land, and many shall be overthrown: but these shall escape out of his hand, Edom, and Moab, and the chief of the children of Ammon.

chapters.zh: 他必伸手攻击列国；埃及地也不得脱离。
chapters.en: He shall stretch forth his hand also upon the countries: and the land of Egypt shall not escape.

chapters.zh: 他必把持埃及的金银财宝和各样的宝物。吕彼亚人和古实人都必跟从他。
chapters.en: But he shall have power over the treasures of gold and of silver, and over all the precious things of Egypt: and the Libyans and the Ethiopians at his steps.

chapters.zh: 但从东方和北方必有消息扰乱他，他就大发烈怒出去，要将多人杀灭净尽。
chapters.en: But tidings out of the east and out of the north shall trouble him: therefore he shall go forth with great fury to destroy, and utterly to make away many.

chapters.zh: 他必在海和荣美的圣山中间设立他如宫殿的帐幕；然而到了他的结局，必无人能帮助他。
chapters.en: And he shall plant the tabernacles of his palace between the seas in the glorious holy mountain; yet he shall come to his end, and none shall help him.

chapters.zh: 那时，保佑你本国之民的天使长（原文是大君）米迦勒必站起来，并且有大艰难，从有国以来直到此时，没有这样的。你本国的民中，凡名录在册上的，必得拯救。
chapters.en: And at that time shall Michael stand up, the great prince which standeth for the children of thy people: and there shall be a time of trouble, such as never was since there was a nation to that same time: and at that time thy people shall be delivered, every one that shall be found written in the book.

chapters.zh: 睡在尘埃中的，必有多人复醒。其中有得永生的，有受羞辱永远被憎恶的。
chapters.en: And many of them that sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to shame everlasting contempt.

chapters.zh: 智慧人必发光，如同天上的光；那使多人归义的，必发光如星，直到永永远远。
chapters.en: And they that be wise shall shine as the brightness of the firmament; and they that turn many to righteousness as the stars for ever and ever.

chapters.zh: 但以理啊，你要隐藏这话，封闭这书，直到末时。必有多人来往奔跑（或译：切心研究），知识就必增长。
chapters.en: But thou, O Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book, to the time of the end: many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall be increased.

chapters.zh: 我 ─ 但以理观看，见另有两个人站立：一个在河这边，一个在河那边。
chapters.en: Then I Daniel looked, and, behold, there stood other two, the one on this side of the bank of the river, and the other on that side of the bank of the river.

chapters.zh: 有一个问那站在河水以上、穿细麻衣的说：这奇异的事到几时才应验呢？
chapters.en: And said to the man clothed in linen, which upon the waters of the river, How long the end of these wonders?

chapters.zh: 我听见那站在河水以上、穿细麻衣的，向天举起左右手，指著活到永远的主起誓说：要到一载、二载、半载，打破圣民权力的时候，这一切事就都应验了。
chapters.en: And I heard the man clothed in linen, which upon the waters of the river, when he held up his right hand and his left hand unto heaven, and sware by him that liveth for ever that for a time, times, and an half; and when he shall have accomplished to scatter the power of the holy people, all these shall be finished.

chapters.zh: 我听见这话，却不明白，就说：我主啊，这些事的结局是怎样呢？
chapters.en: And I heard, but I understood not: then said I, O my Lord, what the end of these ?

chapters.zh: 他说：但以理啊，你只管去；因为这话已经隐藏封闭，直到末时。
chapters.en: And he said, Go thy way, Daniel: for the words closed up and sealed till the time of the end.

chapters.zh: 必有许多人使自己清净洁白，且被熬炼；但恶人仍必行恶，一切恶人都不明白，惟独智慧人能明白。
chapters.en: Many shall be purified, and made white, and tried; but the wicked shall do wickedly: and none of the wicked shall understand; but the wise shall understand.

chapters.zh: 从除掉常献的燔祭，并设立那行毁坏可憎之物的时候，必有一千二百九十日。
chapters.en: And from the time the daily shall be taken away, and the abomination that maketh desolate set up, a thousand two hundred and ninety days.

chapters.zh: 等到一千三百三十五日的，那人便为有福。
chapters.en: Blessed he that waiteth, and cometh to the thousand three hundred and five and thirty days.

chapters.zh: 你且去等候结局，因为你必安歇。到了末期，你必起来，享受你的福分。
chapters.en: But go thou thy way till the end : for thou shalt rest, and stand in thy lot at the end of the days.
